scope: Catalytic-frontier mechanism implementations, builds, tests, live executions, controls, results, and blockers. Routine read-only navigation and file-edit transport are excluded.
result_policy: This ledger records attempts; lab/results.jsonl remains the authority for measured scientific result claims.

mechanism: CAT_CAS and Main Primers trajectory reconstruction
intervention: Read all Main Primers and relevant CAT_CAS mechanisms; reconcile with Neo3000 mandatory entry documents.
outcome: Repository trajectory aligns with retained executable state, exact identity, borrow-transform-extract-restore, and bounded carriers, but finite cache reuse alone does not establish unbounded catalytic inference.
next_boundary: Require one transition law valid for every finite N with bounded active residency, exact closure, equal utility, all costs counted, and cumulative saved work growing as Omega(N).

intervention: Implement exact emitted-token root capture, strict-extension branches, one slot snapshot, restore controls, direct same-token controls, counted one-token closure, resource accounting, and cleanup.
execution: no-model validation plus later live use
outcome: Harness became retryable and isolated from one-shot publication machinery, except for a subsequently discovered evaluator-lock dependency.
next_boundary: Test two independent root geometries, then scale distinct projections geometrically.

outcome.utility: 2/2 catalytic and 2/2 direct correct with equal route answers
2/2 catalytic and 2/2 direct correct with equal route answers

next_boundary: Scale both geometries to distinct N=2,4,8 projections.

intervention: Implement two eight-projection panels, restore between branches, closure at N=2,4,8, direct same-token controls, and exact final snapshot comparison.
outcome: All tests passed; one root snapshot supports geometric accounting without changing the stable server.
next_boundary: Run exact-commit confirmation on both geometries.

outcome.utility: 8/8 catalytic and 8/8 direct correct with equal route answers

next_boundary: Replicate exact curve on the second geometry.

outcome.utility: 8/8 catalytic and 8/8 direct correct with equal route answers

next_boundary: Record the bounded claim without promoting it to unbounded inference.

intervention: Append neo-exp-0050 and synchronize TASKS.md and lab/CHECKPOINT.md with the finite frontier signal and explicit N-infinity boundary.
next_boundary: Define and execute a procedural infinite-family stress probe beyond N=8.

intervention: Define a fixed phase transition law for every nonnegative finite tick; stream N=16,32,64,128 branches with rolling scalar hashes, geometric closures, direct controls, and no per-branch result retention.
outcome: All 10 tests passed; active controller state is constant-size apart from separately declared O(log N) audit milestones.
next_boundary: Run N=16 live, then continue geometrically while residency and quality remain invariant.

diagnosis: The discovery harness still consumed the frozen one-shot governance lock, coupling mechanism execution to task-board hashes unrelated to runtime identity.
next_boundary: Extract a runtime-only sidecar loader while preserving exact binary, model, template, memory, timeout, and listener checks.

intervention: Load and validate the executable HoloState contract and runtime safety fields without consulting the one-shot protected-file lock; route all frontier harnesses through it.
outcome: All tests passed, including a regression that makes any accidental verify_lock call fail.
next_boundary: Commit the repair and retry the exact-commit N=16 live probe.

execution: live Agents-A1 run with one snapshot and restore before tick 2
next_boundary: Run the identical tick-2 token sequence as a fresh cache-disabled control to distinguish model-facing task encoding failure from carrier restore contamination before altering the phase law.
